terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.body:
Welcome to Keka's Blessings From Heaven. By accessing our website, booking an appointment, or receiving services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

## Services

Keka's Blessings From Heaven provides IV vitamin therapy and wellness injection services administered by licensed healthcare professionals. All services are elective wellness services and are not a substitute for diagnosis or treatment by your primary medical provider.

## Eligibility & Consultation

All clients must complete a health intake and consultation prior to receiving any treatment. We reserve the right to decline service to anyone for whom treatment may not be appropriate. You must be 18 years or older to receive services.

## Appointments & Cancellations

Appointments may be booked online or by phone. We kindly ask for at least 24 hours notice to reschedule or cancel. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee.

## Payment

Payment is due at the time of service unless arranged through our financing partner. We accept major credit and debit cards and approved financing.

## Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Keka's Blessings From Heaven is not liable for any indirect or incidental damages arising from the use of our website or services.

## Changes to These Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

## Contact

Questions about these terms? Reach us using the contact information on this site.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how Keka's Blessings From Heaven collects, uses, and protects your information.

## Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, contact details, and health intake information needed to deliver safe care. We may also collect basic analytics about how visitors use our website.

## How We Use Your Information

We use your information to schedule and provide services, communicate with you, process payments, and improve our offerings. We do not sell your personal information.

## Health Information

Health information collected during your consultation is kept confidential and used only to provide safe, appropriate care.

## Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your information. No method of transmission over the internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

## Your Choices

You may request to review, update, or delete your personal information by contacting us.

## Contact

For privacy questions, please reach out using the contact details on this site.

refund.title: Return & Refund Policy
refund.body:
Because our services are personalized health and wellness treatments, the following policy applies.

## Services

Services that have been rendered are non-refundable. If you are unsatisfied with your experience, please contact us within 48 hours so we can make it right.

## Deposits & Pre-Paid Packages

Deposits hold your appointment time and may be applied to a rescheduled visit with adequate notice. Pre-paid packages are non-refundable but may be transferred in certain circumstances at our discretion.

## Products

Unopened retail products may be returned within 14 days of purchase for store credit. Opened products cannot be returned for health and safety reasons.

## How to Reach Us

To discuss a concern or request, contact us using the information on this site.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer & Informed Consent
disclaimer.body:
Please read this important information before booking.

## Wellness Services Only

The services offered by Keka's Blessings From Heaven are intended for general wellness and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition. Our services do not replace care from your physician.

## Consultation Required

A health intake and consultation is required before treatment. Please disclose all medical conditions, allergies, medications, and pregnancy status. Certain conditions may make treatment unsuitable.

## Individual Results

Results vary from person to person. Statements on this website have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.

## When to Seek Emergency Care

If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911. Do not use this website or wait for an appointment in an emergency.

## Acknowledgement

By booking and receiving services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this disclaimer and consent to treatment.
